description: Paired P0/P4 elder ride-hailing dispatch-priority experiment at the selected 12-vehicle nine-zone baseline.
priority_scope: Actual request time remains the first queue key. Only ride-hailing requests with the same actual request time are reordered by elder group rank, followed by the shared seed-based dispatch priority and leg_id.
scope_notes: P4 does not add vehicles and does not change mode-choice utility, fares, digital access, activities, weather, fallback rules or base dispatch-priority draws.
Coupons are disabled and elder digital-access attributes remain at their generated baseline values.
This is a finite-resource redistribution mechanism test, not a calibrated Shanghai platform rule or forecast.
